summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep strength in SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, dimensional modeling, data warehousing, and cloud data platforms. Experienced building production data pipelines, reporting layers, telemetry analytics, forecasting systems, and governance-aware data solutions in regulated enterprise environments. Strong fit for AWS-centered data engineering roles involving S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, data quality, documentation, root-cause analysis, and collaboration with architecture, analytics, security, and business stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual reporting processes with repeatable data pipelines for analytics, forecasting, and executive decision-making.

Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention models supporting capacity forecasting, seasonal analysis, data quality review, and operational reporting across large-scale banking infrastructure.
Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift forecasting workloads, and reporting-ready datasets for capacity, risk, and performance analytics.

Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, improving planning lead time and giving stakeholders actionable infrastructure insights.
Integrated disparate monitoring and telemetry feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting structures, improving cross-system visibility and root-cause analysis.
Created Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards to surface capacity trends, utilization patterns, operational risk signals, and performance metrics for senior stakeholders.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, governance, and leadership teams to define reliable reporting standards, automate manual processes, document workflows, and improve data delivery quality.
Supported production troubleshooting by analyzing data defects, telemetry anomalies, process gaps, and performance bottlenecks across enterprise systems.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting operational reporting, data-driven performance analysis, and production observability.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, strengthening visibility into customer-facing workflows and application performance.
Upgraded Dynatrace AppMon from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no production monitoring regression during cutover.
Collaborated with engineering, QA, and infrastructure teams to correlate load-test results, APM traces, and performance data into actionable remediation guidance.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM subject matter expert for a large financial-services environment, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise applications.
Designed management modules, dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards that became repeatable patterns for monitoring and operational decision support.
Built Perl and Korn shell extraction scripts that automated performance reporting and reduced manual weekly export work.
Led major CA APM upgrades with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating application, infrastructure, and client stakeholders.
Documented implementation patterns, onboarding practices, troubleshooting methods, and training materials used by technical teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, improving scalability while reducing infrastructure footprint.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, maintaining sub-second query latency for high-volume workloads.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and cutover support processes to protect data integrity during phased migration.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability telecom billing interfaces using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, XML, Korn shell, and UNIX platforms.
Improved billing process throughput and database performance through SQL, PL/SQL, memory, and sequence optimization work.
Maintained reporting and interface workflows across invoicing, settlement, EDI, and operational support systems.
Led QA cycles, production triage, documentation, and support handoff for enterprise billing and customer-management modules.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, C++, Java, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON
skills.AWS Data Platform: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, AWS data lake patterns
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, data transformation, data warehousing, data lakes, dimensional modeling, metadata management, reporting layers, operational analytics
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server concepts, DynamoDB concepts, relational schema design, query tuning, partitioning concepts
skills.Big Data & File Formats: PySpark, Apache Spark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, Snappy compression, distributed processing, batch processing, medallion architecture concepts
skills.Data Quality & Governance: Data validation, reconciliation, root-cause analysis, data lineage concepts, data stewardship concepts, access-control awareness, compliance-aware data handling, documentation
skills.Observability & Operations: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, dashboards, alerts, thresholds, transaction tracing, production support
skills.Delivery & Collaboration: Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, JIRA, technical documentation, SOPs, mentoring, stakeholder communication

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock concepts to support scalable ingestion, transformation, query access, and AI-assisted data workflows. Emphasized cost-aware file layout, metadata, and query-ready datasets.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics engine for enterprise telemetry data, replacing manual forecasting with repeatable pipelines, models, dashboards, and operational decision support.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python workflow for intake, semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking. Demonstrates API integration, structured data contracts, validation, and automation discipline.
